title: SPOTS
html:
August 2020 Corvallis outdoor-study-spot list by Yahir — modified through Aug 2021, so it ran for a full year as a working map. Locations: corner of Sizzlers, Performant-adjacent table, outer Tussing Park, Lower Lola Spot at Riverside Park, parking lot behind MyBookStore, behind Walmart Auto Center, Westholm Park, Grange Coop run-path bench, Lawn Ridge League table.

TL;DR

  • A working geographic index of where high-school-into-college Yahir actually got work done in Corvallis.
  • Mentions lola (the dog) by namesake spot — "Lower Table at Riverside Park Lola Spot."
  • Predates the MyBookStore location appearing as a project entity.

yahir gonzalez · corvallis or · lola · mybookstore · walmart
